issue.name: author_association
issue.description: How the author is associated with the repository.

childParamsGroups.name: color
childParamsGroups.description: 6-character hex code, without the leading #, identifying the color

issue.name: milestone
issue.description: A collection of related issues and pull requests.

issue.name: type
issue.description: The type assigned to the issue. This is only present for issues in repositories where issue types are supported.

childParamsGroups.name: id
childParamsGroups.description: The unique identifier of the issue type.

childParamsGroups.name: node_id
childParamsGroups.description: The node identifier of the issue type.

childParamsGroups.name: updated_at
childParamsGroups.description: The time the issue type last updated.

childParamsGroups.name: is_enabled
childParamsGroups.description: The enabled state of the issue type.
